title: Vtopmart 8 Pack Drawer Dividers, 3.2" High Expandable from 12.2-21.4" Adjustable Drawer Organisers，Clear Plastic Drawers Separators for Clothing, Kitchen Utensils and Office Storage
features: Easy to install----Quick and easy to install，no hardware or tools needed. Just stick the double-sided tape(included) on the divider, tear off the tape, put it in the drawer, adjust it to a suitable position, and then stick the divider on the drawer, it will expand to the desired length and can be firmly held in place in drawers.

Expandable & Adjustable----Both sides of the divider can be expanded outward, expandable from 12'' to 21'', 3.2'' High. （Tips：Please measure the drawer dimensions before purchasing. This product is suitable for drawers measuring 12" Lx 12"W）

Multipurpose drawer dividers----Use these to create customized drawer storage anywhere. Ideal for keeping drawers organized and items easy to find what you need. Perfect for organizing junk drawers, clothes, kitchen utensils, office desk supplies, makeups, bathroom clutter and more.

Sturdy Material----Made of durable shatter-resistant plastic; Moreover, the double-sided adhesive tape acts as a buffer to effectively protect the drawers from scratching and marring. The sturdy and durable material will last long, providing convenience and comfort to you. They will play a greater role of organization and storage.

Space saving design----The thickness of the divider is only 0.5'', this design will improve the space utilization, they can be placed vertically or horizontally, and even stacked in the drawer, providing a great deal of flexibility to fit the various sizes of the drawers.
description: Product Description Vtopmart Drawer Dividers Organizers A simple way to organize your drawers Packing List: 8 pack dividers, each divider is allocated 4 pieces of double-sided tapes, and installation instructions. The package contains everything you need, no additional tools are required. Dimension: 3.2" High,Expandable from 12.2-21.7" Notice: Please wash the drawer dividers by hand,do not put in the dishwasher. please measure the size of the drawer before purchasing.the overall length of the divider is 21.7 inches,in order to keep the stability of the divider, the maximum value of the divider don't exceed 19 inches. After the dividers are glued into the drawer, please let it stay in place for 3 minutes, and the dividers are snug in the drawer before placing items. Divide Kitchen Utensils Kitchen organizer--Perfect for separating kitchen utensil by utensil type Divide Clothes Bedroom organizer--keep socks and underwear manageable Divide Makeups Dresser drawer organizer--Custom storage solution for makeups Divide Office Supplies Office drawer organizer--Divide office desk supplies to meet your needs
